first.name: appointement fix
first.description: schdule meeting with the incharge with store owner for laptop for eli

steps.title: Schedule Meeting
steps.objective: Schedule a meeting with the store owner and incharge for laptop discussion
steps.ai_instructions: Use Google Meet to schedule a meeting with the attendees

arguments.summary: Meeting with store owner and incharge for laptop discussion

steps.title: Generate Meeting Invitation Body
steps.objective: Create a personalized email body for the meeting invitation
steps.ai_instructions: Use AI to generate a professional email body based on the meeting details

arguments.user_input: Meeting invitation for discussion about laptop for Eli

steps.title: Send Meeting Invitation Email
steps.objective: Send the meeting invitation to the attendees
steps.ai_instructions: Use Gmail to send the meeting invitation to the attendees

arguments.subject: Meeting Invitation: Discussion about laptop for Eli

issues.problem: preferred_date, start_time, and end_time are empty strings but required for scheduling; should either be filled or added to requirements_needed
issues.fix_applied: Removed preferred_date, start_time, and end_time from arguments since google_meet.schedule_meeting_on_first_available uses first available slot and does not require these fields

issues.problem: dynamic_inputs is empty but could use output from step 1 (meeting details) to personalize email body
issues.fix_applied: Added dynamic_inputs to reference meeting details from step 1 output

issues.problem: body_html is empty and should be populated with output from step 2
issues.fix_applied: Set body_html to {step_2.email_body to use generated email content
